description: White polo neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton that has blue, red and black stripes in varying widths, half sleeves, blue and white striped ribbed collar with tape detailing on the inseam, red and white striped ribbed cuffs, half buttoned placket, red stitch detailing on the shoulders, inseam of the sleeves and on the side seams, vented hems and embroidered brand detailing on the upper left chest
